name: Noise Background
summary: An animated background with moving gradient orbs and noise texture overlay for atmospheric effects.
detailedDescription: Noise Background creates a dynamic animated background using multiple gradient layers that follow smooth spring-animated cursor movement. The component uses motion values for x/y position with spring physics (stiffness: 100, damping: 30) for fluid motion. Multiple GradientLayer components render radial gradients at calculated positions, each with configurable color, opacity, and multiplier for parallax depth effect. The useMotionTemplate creates dynamic CSS background strings updating in real-time. A noise texture overlay (configurable intensity, default 0.2) adds film grain texture. Top gradient strip uses separate transform (multiplier 0.1, offset -50) for additional depth. Animation speed controls motion velocity (default 0.1). Backdrop blur option adds frosted glass effect. The component uses requestAnimationFrame via useAnimationFrame for continuous smooth updates. Configurable gradient colors default to pink/blue/orange palette. This creates an organic, lava-lamp-like background suitable for hero sections, landing pages, or any context where flowing color gradients add visual interest without overwhelming content.
purpose: Add depth with multi-layer parallax gradients
behavior: Tracks motion values with spring smoothing
Renders multiple gradient layers at offsets
recommendations: Best for premium landing page sections and hero compositions.
Use as a supporting atmospheric layer rather than the primary layout structure.
